footer.tagline: Ubwikorezi n'ibikorwa bishingiye ku bantu — duhuza abagenzi, abashoferi n'imiryango muri Afurika no hanze yayo.

about.heroHeadline: Uburyo bwiza bwo kugenda. Bwateguriwe ingendo nyazo.
about.heroSub: Ibiciro bisobanutse. Kwumvikana ku giciro. Ingendo zizewe.
about.welcomeP1: Ubwikorezi bugomba kuba bunyangamugayo, busobanutse, kandi bwateguriwe abantu babukoresha — atari uko byifashe ubundi.
about.welcomeP2: Rides iha abagenzi n'abashoferi amakuru y'urugendo, uko igiciro gitangwa, n'uburenganzira bwo kwumvikana mbere y'uko urugendo rutangira. Icyizere gikomoka ku bunyangamugayo. Ubutabera bukomoka ku guhitamo.

bullets.title: Ubunyangamugayo guhera igihe utangiye
bullets.body: Abagenzi babona inzira, igihe giteganyijwe, intera n'igiciro mbere y'uko urugendo rutangira. Abashoferi bamenya ayo bazinjiza mbere yo kwemera urugendo. Nta gitangaza. Nta bibazo byihishe.

bullets.title: Ubutabera biturutse ku guhitamo
bullets.body: Igiciro kigomba kuba ikiganiro, atari icyemezo gifatwa na porogaramu yonyine. Abagenzi n'abashoferi barashobora kumvikana ku giciro mbere y'uko urugendo rutangira, bakagera ku myumvikane iboneye ku mpande zombi.

bullets.title: Umutekano ugerwaho byoroshye
bullets.body: Umutekano ntabwo ari ikintu cyibagirana. Ubufasha bw'ihutirwa mu gukanda rimwe, indangamuntu zemejwe, isuzuma ry'inyandiko, n'itsinda ry'ubufasha rihari — buri rugendo rushingiye ku musingi w'umutekano.

bullets.title: Icyubahiro kimwe cyateganyijwe
bullets.body: Rides yubatswe ku bantu batuma buri rugendo rushoboka — abagenzi n'abashoferi. Icyizere, icyubahiro n'ubutabera ni bimwe mu byo dushyira imbere mu mikoranire yose.

bullets.title: Icyizere kigaragazwa mu bikorwa
bullets.body: Umuntu wese arashobora kuvuga ko yita ku bunyangamugayo n'ubutabera. Turabigaragaza binyuze mu byemezo dufata, ibiranga dukora, n'uburyo dukorera umuryango wacu buri munsi.

faqs.a: Rides ni porogaramu yateguwe kugira ngo ubwikorezi bube bunyangamugayo, buboneye kandi bwizewe ku bagenzi n'abashoferi bombi.
Yego. Rides itangiye gukora ku mugaragaro kandi irahari ku bakoresha.

faqs.q: Rides itandukaniye he na porogaramu zindi?
faqs.a: Rides yibanda ku bunyangamugayo n'ubutabera. Abagenzi babona amakuru y'urugendo mbere yo kwemeza urugendo, kandi abashoferi bamenya ayo bazinjiza mbere y'igihe. Kandi twemerera kwumvikana ku giciro hagati y'abagenzi n'abashoferi.

Mbere y'uko urugendo rutangira, abagenzi n'abashoferi bumvikana ku giciro. Igihe impande zombi zemeye, urugendo rurahamagara. Ibi bituma impande zombi zumvikana ku giciro mbere y'uko urugendo rutangira.
Indangamuntu zemejwe, isuzuma ry'inyandiko ku mushoferi wese, buto y'ihutirwa ikandwa rimwe, n'itsinda ry'ubufasha rihari amasaha 24 ku minsi 7, mu gihe cy'urugendo cyangwa nyuma yarwo.

faqs.q: Nkeneye porutefe kugira ngo nkoreshe Rides?
faqs.a: Nta porutefe ikenewe. Kwishyura bikorwa hagati y'abagenzi n'abashoferi bakurikije igiciro bumvikanyeho.
Rides ubu irahari mu mijyi imwe n'imwe yatoranyijwe, kandi ahandi hazongerwa uko dukura.
Ushobora kuramo porogaramu, ukafungura konti, ukatangira gufata ingendo ako kanya aho serivisi ihari.

drivers.heroHeadline: Twara nk'uko ubishaka, winjize nk'uko ubishaka.
drivers.heroSub: Zana moto yawe, imodoka, hilux cyangwa fuso. Ramo porogaramu ya Rides Umushoferi utangire kwinjiza uyu munsi.
drivers.heroNote: Reba ibyo dutanga hepfo mbere yo gusaba.
drivers.howHeading: Intambwe eshatu. Abenshi mu bashoferi batangira gukora mu masaha 48.
drivers.eligibility: Uzakenera uruhushya rwo gutwara rwemewe, imodoka ikora neza, konti ya mobile money, n'indangamuntu ya Leta. Ibisabwa byihariye ku modoka yawe bizagaragazwa muri porogaramu igihe usaba.

benefits.title: Kwishyurwa buri munsi
benefits.detail: Wishyurwa buri munsi ukoze, agahita ajya kuri mobile money yawe. Nta gutegereza icyumweru, nta ntangiro ntoya isabwa.

benefits.title: Ubukungu bushingiye ku mushoferi
benefits.detail: Ibiciro bisobanutse nta kivunanwa kihishe. Ubona icyo uzinjiza mbere yo kwemera urugendo.

benefits.title: Ubufasha nyabwo bw'abantu
benefits.detail: Itsinda rihari i Kigali rihari amasaha 24 ku minsi 7. Iyo hari ikibazo, hari umuntu usubiza koko.

benefits.title: Byubatswe mu Rwanda
benefits.detail: Itsinda ryo mu gihugu, inzira zo mu gihugu, uburyo bwo kwishyura bwo mu gihugu. Tuzi uko u Rwanda rugenda.

steps.title: Ramo porogaramu
steps.detail: Bona porogaramu ya Rides Umushoferi kuri App Store cyangwa Google Play.

steps.title: Ohereza amakuru yawe
steps.detail: Porogaramu iragufasha intambwe ku yindi. Ibisabwa byihariye ku modoka yawe bigaragara muri iyi ntambwe.

steps.title: Tangira kwinjiza
steps.detail: Turasuzuma tukanakwemeza, akenshi mu masaha 24 kugeza 48. Nyuma y'aho, uba utangiye gukora.

contactForm.successBody: Murakoze {name} — twanditse ubutumwa bwawe nka {id}. Tuzagusubiza kuri {email}.
